event_name: REI Clinic Series: Orienteering I Aug 23 '79
event_notes:
Second map-and-compass/orienteering lecture at the REI Auditorium (as listed in June/July 1979 issue).

Schedule update: Karl Nolte presents "Orienteering I — Introduction to Orienteering" (REI Co-op Clinic Series), 7pm; lecture room upstairs in the REI retail store.
